title: Stage Validation
description: Result of adversarial validation from exploit agent. Proves or disproves a finding with a working PoC, then records the patch.

finding_id.description: Case ID from the casefile ledger

status.description: Validation status: confirmed (PoC passed), killed (failed), or reported (patched)

technique_used.description: The specific technique/payload used in the PoC

detection_method.description: How success was detected (timing, error message, response content, OOB callback, etc.)

poc_path.description: Path to the PoC script on disk (required when confirmed)

run_log.description: Summary of the PoC output including exit code (required when confirmed)

evidence_extracted.description: Data extracted or state changed that proves the finding

kill_reason.description: Reason the finding was killed (required when killed)

refinement_attempts.description: Number of refinement attempts before success or kill
